scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && FLASK_APP=wsgi.py FLASK_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m flask run --port=5050 --debug
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n backend,frontend,electron -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5050/api/health http://localhost:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.db:upgrade: cd backend && FLASK_APP=wsgi.py FLASK_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m flask db upgrade
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && FLASK_APP=wsgi.py FLASK_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m flask seed
scripts.db:seed-builds: cd backend && FLASK_APP=wsgi.py FLASK_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m flask seed-builds
